privacy.html:
Privacy Policy (Datenschutzerklärung) for the Flowa App

1. Introduction

This Privacy Policy applies to the Flowa app developed by Georgios Andi Avenidis. If you have any questions about privacy, you can reach us at info@georgevalandis.com.

2. Type of Data Collected

Although Flowa does not automatically collect personal data, users may choose to enter personal or sensitive information within the app, e.g., in journal entries, notes, or through voice recordings. These entered data and voice recordings are also stored exclusively locally on the device and are not transmitted to external servers or third parties. It is important to note that these data fall under the responsibility of the user, and we recommend handling sensitive information cautiously.

This includes:

Usage Data: Information about the user’s interaction with the app, such as frequency of use and specific features used. These data help us understand and improve the user experience.

Technical Data: Information about the user’s device, such as operating system version and device type, required to ensure compatibility and improve app performance.

These data are not personal and cannot be used to individually identify a user.

3. Data Collection and Purpose

The app allows users to enter their own content, which may contain personal data. These data are used exclusively to provide and improve the functionality of the app and remain on the user’s device without being transmitted to the developer or third parties.

4. Data Transfer and Storage

Since the Flowa app does not collect personal data, no such data are transmitted to external servers or third parties. All data generated or entered in the app remain completely on the user’s device and are treated as follows:

Local Storage: Data are securely stored on the user’s device and are accessible only through the app.

No Synchronization: The app does not synchronize with cloud services or other external storage media to ensure users’ privacy.

Data Deletion: When uninstalling the app, all locally stored data are removed from the user’s device.

It is recommended to regularly back up the device to prevent loss of data stored in the app.

5. Rights of Users

Users have the right to access, edit, or delete their personal data entered in the app at any time. Uninstalling the app removes all entered data from the device, which constitutes the revocation of data storage. The entered data are then irreversibly deleted.

6. Consent and Withdrawal

Using the app does not require specific consent for data storage, as no personal data are collected. Users may uninstall the app at any time.

7. Security Measures

The security of your data is important to us. Since all data are stored on your device, we recommend protecting your device with appropriate measures such as passwords or biometric security features.

8. Cookies and Tracking Technologies

The app does not use cookies or tracking technologies.

9. Changes to the Privacy Policy

We reserve the right to change this Privacy Policy at any time. Users will be informed about significant changes.

10. Child Protection

The app is not specifically designed for or marketed to children under the age of 13. Since Flowa does not collect personal data or require user accounts, we cannot independently verify the age of users. However, we strongly advise that children under 13 do not use the app without parental guidance. If you believe that a child under 13 has entered sensitive information into the app, please ensure the data is removed from the device.

11. Contact Information for Privacy Inquiries

If you have any questions about privacy, please contact info@georgevalandis.com.

privacy.html:
Privacy Policy (Datenschutzerklärung) for the GlanceAway App

1. Introduction

This Privacy Policy applies to the GlanceAway app developed by Georgios Andi Avenidis. If you have any questions about privacy, you can reach us at info@georgevalandis.com.

2. Type of Data Collected

GlanceAway is designed with your privacy as a priority. The app does not collect any personal data. All settings and app-related information are stored exclusively on your device.

The app stores the following non-personal data on your device to function correctly:

  • Configuration Data: Information about your preferences, such as whether you have completed the onboarding process or enabled reminders.
  • Technical Data: The app may use system-level information, like your operating system version, to ensure compatibility and performance, but this data is not collected or transmitted.

These data are anonymous, stored locally, and cannot be used to identify you.

3. Data Collection and Purpose

GlanceAway does not require you to enter any personal information. The data stored on your device is used solely to provide and enhance the app’s functionality, such as remembering your settings.

4. Data Transfer and Storage

GlanceAway does not collect, transmit, or share any data with external parties. All data remain on your device, adhering to the following principles:

  • Local Storage: All settings are securely stored on your device and accessible only through the app.
  • No Synchronization: The app does not sync with cloud services or external databases, ensuring complete privacy.
  • Data Deletion: Uninstalling the app permanently removes all stored data from the device.

Users are advised to regularly back up their devices to avoid accidental data loss.

5. Rights of Users

Since the app does not store personal data entered by you, you have full control over the app’s settings within the app itself. Uninstalling the app will permanently erase all stored settings and configuration data, making recovery impossible.

6. Consent and Withdrawal

By using the app, you agree to the local storage of configuration data as described. You can discontinue usage at any time by uninstalling the app, which will also delete all its data.


7. Security Measures

Because all data are stored locally, you are encouraged to secure your device with a password, biometric authentication, or other security features to prevent unauthorized access to your apps and data.

8. Cookies and Tracking Technologies

GlanceAway does not use cookies, trackers, or analytics services.

9. Changes to the Privacy Policy

We reserve the right to modify this Privacy Policy at any time. Significant updates will be communicated appropriately.

10. Child Protection

The app is not specifically designed for children under 13. Since no personal data are collected or accounts required, age verification is not performed.

11. Contact Information for Privacy Inquiries

If you have any questions about privacy, please contact info@georgevalandis.com.

privacy.html:
Privacy Policy (Datenschutzerklärung) for the Perfect Day App

1. Introduction

This Privacy Policy applies to the Perfect Day app developed by Georgios Andi Avenidis. If you have any questions about privacy, you can reach us at info@georgevalandis.com.

2. Type of Data Collected

Perfect Day does not automatically collect personal data. However, users may choose to enter personal or sensitive information within the app, such as habit entries, notes, or progress tracking data. These data are stored exclusively on the user’s device and are not transmitted to external servers or third parties.

The app may collect the following non-personal data to improve the user experience:

  • Usage Data: Information about app interactions, such as feature usage frequency, to help enhance functionality.
  • Technical Data: Device type and operating system version to ensure compatibility and optimize performance.

These data are anonymous and cannot be used to identify individual users.

3. Data Collection and Purpose

Users can enter their own content in the app, including habit logs and personal notes. These data are used solely to provide and enhance the app’s functionality and remain entirely on the user’s device.

4. Data Storage and Transfer

Perfect Day does not collect, transmit, or share personal data with external parties. All user data remain on the device, adhering to the following principles:

  • Local Storage: All entries are securely stored on the user’s device and accessible only through the app.
  • No Synchronization: The app does not sync with cloud services or external databases, ensuring complete user privacy.
  • Data Deletion: Uninstalling the app permanently removes all stored data from the device.

Users are advised to regularly back up their devices to avoid accidental data loss.

5. User Rights

Users have full control over their data and can view, edit, or delete their habit entries at any time. Uninstalling the app will permanently erase all stored data, making recovery impossible.

6. Consent and Withdrawal

Since the app does not collect personal data, no explicit consent is required. Users can discontinue usage at any time by uninstalling the app.

7. Security Measures

Because all data are stored locally, users are encouraged to secure their devices with passwords, biometric authentication, or other security features to prevent unauthorized access.

8. Cookies and Tracking

Perfect Day does not use cookies, trackers, or analytics services.

9. Changes to the Privacy Policy

We reserve the right to modify this Privacy Policy at any time. Significant updates will be communicated appropriately.

10. Child Protection

The app is not specifically designed for children under 13. Since no personal data are collected or accounts required, age verification is not possible. Parents should supervise children’s usage if necessary.

11. Contact Information

If you have any questions about privacy, please contact info@georgevalandis.com.

privacy.html:
Privacy Policy (Datenschutzerklärung) for the SaveTap App

1. Introduction

This Privacy Policy applies to the SaveTap app developed by Georgios Andi Avenidis. If you have any questions about privacy, you can contact us at info@georgevalandis.com.

2. Type of Data Collected

SaveTap does not automatically collect personal data. However, users may choose to enter personal or sensitive information within the app, for example, by adding savings entries, notes, or custom categories. These data are stored exclusively locally on the device and are not transmitted to external servers or third parties.

It is important to note that all entered information is under the responsibility of the user. We recommend handling sensitive data with care.

In addition, the app may process:

  • Usage Data: Information about how the app is used (e.g., frequency of use, features used) to help improve user experience.
  • Technical Data: Device information such as operating system version and device type, required to ensure app performance and compatibility.

These data are not personal and cannot be used to identify individual users.

3. Data Collection and Purpose

The app allows users to enter their own financial or savings-related information. These data are used solely to provide and improve the app’s functionality. All data remain on the device and are not transmitted to the developer or any third party.

4. Data Transfer and Storage

Because SaveTap does not collect personal data, no such data are shared or transmitted externally. All user-generated data remain entirely on the device:

  • Local Storage: Data are securely stored locally and can only be accessed through the app.
  • No Synchronization: The app does not connect to cloud services or external storage.
  • Data Deletion: Uninstalling the app permanently removes all data stored on the device.

We recommend backing up your device regularly to avoid loss of locally stored information.

5. Rights of Users

Users can access, edit, or delete their entries at any time within the app. Uninstalling the app removes all locally stored data, which constitutes a revocation of data storage. These data are then irreversibly deleted.

6. Consent and Withdrawal

Using SaveTap does not require special consent for data storage, since no personal data are collected or transmitted. You may uninstall the app at any time.

7. Security Measures

The protection of your data is important to us. Because all data are stored directly on your device, we recommend enabling device protection measures such as passwords, PIN codes, or biometric locks.

8. Cookies and Tracking Technologies

SaveTap does not use cookies or tracking technologies.

9. Changes to the Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Significant changes will be communicated to users in an appropriate manner.

10. Child Protection

The app is not specifically designed for or marketed to children under the age of 13. Since SaveTap does not collect personal data or require user accounts, we cannot verify the age of users. We recommend that children under 13 only use the app under parental supervision. If you believe a child has entered sensitive data, please ensure it is removed from the device.

11. Contact Information

If you have any questions about privacy, please contact info@georgevalandis.com.

privacy.html:
1. Introduction

This Privacy Policy applies to the QuitERGY mobile application developed by Georgios Andi Avenidis.

QuitERGY helps users track and reduce their energy drink consumption, build healthier habits, and monitor their progress — while fully respecting user privacy.

QuitERGY is designed according to the principle of privacy by design. All user-generated data remain entirely on your device and are never transmitted to us or to any third parties.

2. Types of Data Processed

QuitERGY does not automatically collect, analyze, or transmit any personal data.

Users may voluntarily enter information within the app, which is stored locally on the device only.

This may include:

  • User-entered data:Drink logs, notes, streaks, or progress tracking information.
  • Notifications and reminders:Used locally to support habit consistency.
  • Technical data:Device type or system version, processed only locally to ensure app functionality.
  • Optional location data (if enabled):Used solely to trigger local reminders (e.g., at specific places or times).Location data are never transmitted externally and are not used for analytics.

QuitERGY does not use analytics tools, advertising SDKs, or third-party tracking technologies.

3. Purpose and Legal Basis of Processing

Data processing is limited to what is necessary for app functionality:

  • App functionality:To provide the core features of the app(Article 6(1)(b) GDPR – performance of a contract)
  • Reminders and notifications:Based on your explicit consent(Article 6(1)(a) GDPR)

You may revoke consent at any time by adjusting notification or location permissions in your device settings.

Without these permissions, certain features (such as geofenced reminders) may not function correctly.

4. Data Storage and Transfer

QuitERGY does not transfer any data to external servers or third parties.

  • Local storage:All data are stored securely on your device.
  • No cloud synchronization:The app does not connect to any cloud databases.
  • Data deletion:All locally stored data are deleted when the app is uninstalled.

We recommend regular device backups to prevent accidental data loss.

5. User Rights

Under the GDPR and applicable data protection laws, users have the following rights:

  • Right of access, rectification, or deletion (by editing data or uninstalling the app)
  • Right to restrict processing (by disabling permissions)
  • Right to data portability (if applicable)
  • Right to object or withdraw consent
  • Right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority

Since all data processing occurs locally on your device, these rights can usually be exercised directly through your device or app settings.

6. Consent and Withdrawal

QuitERGY does not require consent for external data processing, as no such processing occurs.

If you grant access to notifications or location services, you may withdraw consent at any time via your system settings.

7. Security Measures

  • All data remain entirely on your device.
  • We recommend protecting your device with biometric authentication or a secure password.
  • If available, you may enable an in-app lock.
  • QuitERGY does not engage in automated decision-making or profiling.

8. Cookies and Tracking Technologies

QuitERGY does not use cookies or any tracking technologies.

9. Third-Party Analytics and Advertising

QuitERGY does not use third-party analytics services, SDKs, or advertising networks.

No user data are transmitted, shared, or analyzed externally.

10. Device Backups

If your device is backed up (e.g., via iCloud or Google Drive), QuitERGY’s local data may be included in those backups.

We have no access to or control over such backups. Backup management is handled entirely by your platform provider.

11. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time.

The current version number and effective date are displayed at the top of this page.

Significant changes will be communicated within the app or on our website.

12. Child Protection

QuitERGY is not intended for children under the age of 13.

As no personal data are collected or transmitted, we cannot verify user age.

Parents or guardians should supervise children’s use of the app.

If a child has entered personal data, please delete it directly within the app or uninstall the app.

13. International Compliance

QuitERGY complies with applicable international privacy regulations, including:

  • EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
  • U.S. Children’s Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA)

As no personal data are collected from children under 13, compliance is ensured by design.

14. Governing Law and Jurisdiction

This Privacy Policy is governed by the laws of the Federal Republic of Germany.

Any disputes shall be subject to the non-exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Wiesbaden, Germany.

15. Language and Translations

This Privacy Policy may be translated into other languages for convenience.

In case of discrepancies, the English version shall prevail.

16. Contact Information

If you have any questions regarding privacy or this Privacy Policy, please contact:

Email: info@georgevalandis.com
